title: Life Processes: Photosynthesis
description: Master the complete concept of photosynthesis with storytelling, analogies, deep explanations, quizzes, and memory tricks.

title: Light: Reflection and Refraction
description: Understand the laws of reflection and refraction with interactive light ray simulators.

title: Chemical Reactions and Equations
description: Learn how to balance chemical equations and identify different types of reactions.

title: Nationalism in India
description: Explore the Indian independence movement, Non-Cooperation, and Civil Disobedience.

title: Control and Coordination
description: Dive into the human brain, nervous system, and plant hormones.

title: The Human Eye and Colourful World
description: Discover how the eye works, defects of vision, and dispersion of light through a prism.

title: Acids, Bases and Salts
description: Test pH levels and understand the properties of various acids and bases.

title: The Rise of Nationalism in Europe
description: Understand the French Revolution and the making of modern European nations.

title: Quadratic Equations
description: Master the quadratic formula, factorization, and completing the square methods.

title: Introduction to Trigonometry
description: Explore sine, cosine, tangent, and their applications in solving real-world height and distance problems.

title: Arithmetic Progressions
description: Learn to find the nth term and the sum of the first n terms of an AP.
